title: Zombie type
description: A distinct zombie type (FR-CBT-07). Static definition only; the behavioural tags are read by the T25 state machine, and placement is per node via NodeState.zombieTypes. The undead are strictly human-only (canon, GDD IX) — every type is a formerly-human threat, never a reanimated animal. M2 shipped the walker baseline plus the Screamer and Stalker; T46 completes the roster (Fresh, Crawler, Bloated, Riot).

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form zombie.<slug>.

description.description: How the type reads in a Scene (ICU MessageFormat string).

signature.description: The non-audio tell that lets a player recognise this type without sound (FR-AUD-06): the readable on-screen cue the client surfaces (e.g. a caption tag). The game is fully playable with sound off.

rousesNeighbours.description: On reaching investigating/chasing, deposits noise into adjacent nodes (Screamer, FR-CBT-07).

nightHunter.description: Drives toward chasing at night when the player is near (Stalker, FR-CBT-07).

swift.description: Recently turned and fast (Fresh, FR-CBT-07): escalates the arousal ladder harder from a stimulus — the sound of speed — so it reaches chasing where a plain node would only stir.

lowProfile.description: Keeps low and easy to miss (Crawler, FR-CBT-07): rouses slowly and quietly, reading calmer than it is until the player is right on top of it — the tell is what you almost walked past.

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
